# Sales Order Module

Module ID: sales-order
Status: draft
Purpose: Tenant-scoped sales orders with line items, external references, status transitions, reservation handoff, and invoice draft handoff.
Entrypoint: src/index.ts
Check: pnpm check:spec
Build: pnpm build
Owned tables: sales_orders, sales_order_line_items, domain_events
Primary use cases: createDraftOrder, getOrder, listOrders, bulkTransitionOrders, confirmOrder, cancelOrder, sendSalesOrder, markOrderInvoiced
Invariants: orders are tenant scoped, external references are unique per tenant/source, totals are integer cents, new orders start as draft, allowed transitions are draft->confirmed, draft->cancelled, confirmed->cancelled, and confirmed->invoiced, confirmation and invoice replay are idempotent, bulk transitions are confirm/cancel only and return per-order partial success results.
